title: Update existing Claude summary with cleanup
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem531_claude_consolidated_contour_status.md')
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem531_update_existing_claude_summary_cleanup.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

if not report.exists():
    report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    text = '# BEM-531 | Consolidated Report for Claude — External Autonomy and Internal Role Contour\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:28 (UTC+3)\n\n'
else:
    text = report.read_text(errors='ignore')

cleanup_row = '| 1 | BEM-531.00 Repository archive cleanup preflight | Проанализировать весь репозиторий и заархивировать устаревшие файлы/записи внешнего и внутреннего контуров без нарушения Deno, GitHub Actions, Python executor v3, curator, role state, file transport, orchestrator и provider adapter | Обязательная первая задача перед доработкой внутреннего контура: в активной зоне репозитория не должно быть мусора; всё переносится в governance/archive с manifest, без безвозвратного удаления |'

# Replace older roadmap table section rows if present. Keep report structure, only normalize roadmap numbering and add cleanup first.
if cleanup_row not in text:
    # If table already has BEM-531.00 curator as first row, rename it to BEM-531.01 and insert cleanup above it.
    text = text.replace('| 1 | BEM-531.00 Unified curator intake architecture |', '| 2 | BEM-531.01 Unified curator intake architecture |')
    text = text.replace('| 2 | BEM-531.1 Role state schema audit and normalization |', '| 3 | BEM-531.1 Role state schema audit and normalization |')
    text = text.replace('| 3 | BEM-531.2 File transport contract |', '| 4 | BEM-531.2 File transport contract |')
    text = text.replace('| 4 | BEM-531.3 Role orchestrator workflow audit |', '| 5 | BEM-531.3 Role orchestrator workflow audit |')
    text = text.replace('| 5 | BEM-531.4 Provider adapter workflow audit |', '| 6 | BEM-531.4 Provider adapter workflow audit |')
    text = text.replace('| 6 | BEM-531.5 Synthetic role cycle E2E |', '| 7 | BEM-531.5 Synthetic role cycle E2E |')
    text = text.replace('| 7 | BEM-531.6 Internal contour dashboard |', '| 8 | BEM-531.6 Internal contour dashboard |')
    marker = '|---|---|---|---|\n'
    idx = text.find('## 4. Updated internal contour roadmap')
    if idx != -1:
        table_start = text.find(marker, idx)
        if table_start != -1:
            insert_pos = table_start + len(marker)
            text = text[:insert_pos] + cleanup_row + '\n' + text[insert_pos:]
    else:
        text += '\n## 4. Updated internal contour roadmap\n\n| Этап | Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|---|\n' + cleanup_row + '\n'

# Update count references to 8 where needed.
text = text.replace('7 этапов', '8 этапов')
text = text.replace('seven stages', 'eight stages')
text = text.replace('7-stage', '8-stage')

# Add short note if absent.
note = 'Обновление: первым пунктом roadmap добавлена обязательная архивация мусора репозитория перед доработкой внутреннего контура.'
if note not in text:
    text += '\n\n## Cleanup-first update\n\n' + note + '\n'

report.write_text(text)
proof.write_text('Existing Claude consolidated report updated in place: cleanup preflight added as first roadmap task.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('updated existing Claude consolidated report with mandatory cleanup as first internal roadmap task')
"""
